exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 annotations and assertions.
exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.Assert) are not part of JUnit 5; tests will fail to compile or run if JUnit 4 dependencies are removed or if the test runner expects JUnit 5 structure.

exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.general_idea: Fix argument order for JUnit 5 assertTrue method.
exec-model-ruleunit/src/test/java/com/kc.why_exists: JUnit 5 Assertions.assertTrue(boolean, String) expects the boolean condition first and the message second, whereas JUnit 4 expected the message first. Compiling with JUnit 5 API using JUnit 4 argument order results in a compile error.
